scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build:api: npm install --prefix server && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.start:prod: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy --prefix server && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
